sections.title: Attempting the zip line with a helm equipped

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: You need to take your headgear off before you try the Deathslide, otherwise you won't be able to get a good enough grip with your teeth.

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Have you brought the stick yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What stick?

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Come on, get round that course - I need something to chew!

sections.title: Attempting the zip line with a helm equipped

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: That headgear won't help you here, human! Take it off!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Grrr - you don't belong in here, human!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Remember - a slow wolf is a hungry wolf!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Get on with it - you need your whiskers perking!!!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Claws first - think later.

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Imagine the smell of blood in your nostrils!!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: I never really wanted to be an agility trainer...

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: It'll be worth it when you hunt!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Let's see those powerful backlegs at work!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Let the bloodlust take you!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: You're the slowest wolf I've ever had the misfortune to witness!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: When you're done there's a human with your name on it!!

sections.title: When climbing up the skull slope without picking up the stick

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: You idiot - you've forgotten the stick!!!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Give my regards to the ground...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: WAAAAAARRRGGGHHHH!!!!!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Don't let the spikes or the blood put you off...

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Now for a true test of teeth...

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: You shouldn't even be here, human!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Let's see how strong human teeth are...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: WAAAAAARRRGGGHHHH!!!!!!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Remember - no stick, no agility bonus!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Bring me the stick when you've finished the course!

lines.speaker: Agility Trainer
lines.text: Don't forget to give me the stick when you're done!
